evidence: "I was especially surprised at how good this movie was for its budget..."
"This is Rambo for the modern era, and it... was... amazing!!!"
"Cliché plot. Horrid soundtrack. Anti-white racism. Poor character decision due to wretched writing."
"This was as predictable and dull, to the max."
"The pacing was perfect. Dialogue believable. The acting was unexpectedly good..."
"So much wasted screen time. I literally didn't care about any of the characters."
"The choreography and monster make-up were meh, but everything else I really quite enjoyed."
"If you like good comedy, this is for you."
"Ignore the 1-star reviews, their opinions are wrong."
"The cinematography and color choices were excellent."
"I could've gone my whole life without watching this unintelligent trash..."
"I literally didn't care about any of the characters."

summary: The user shows a preference for comedies and action films, but has a strong aversion to predictable narratives and poor character development. They value high production quality but often find emotional engagement lacking in the films they review.
